target: 8. To the Harbor
Shinpei still seems to doubt me, huh?
Hmm… That's unfortunate.
So…
Shin-chan! Why is that!?
(Alain's story had some suspicious points)
(I understand Mio wanting to believe him, and I'd like to believe him too)
Shin-chan!
(But if choosing this path leads to Mio being in danger, I'll gladly be the villain)
(Protecting Mio… That's Ushio's wish)
No matter what, escaping the island is our priority now.

I'll go ahead.
It's better for Shinpei to go that way.
Why can't Shin-chan believe in Dad?

Wait, Dad!
I'm coming with you!

Hey, Mio!
Don't get separated!

Repeating the announcement.
A mysterious disaster has occurred
around the Hitogashima Shrine.

Residents wishing to evacuate to the mainland
should board the temporary ferry that has arrived.

Hah… Hah… 
Looks like we made it.

What is this?
Where did all these people come from?
There was no one here when we arrived…

Everyone was hiding in silence
all over the island.

It seems there'll be more temporary ferries.
It looks like everyone can evacuate.
Mio! Shinpei-san!
Tokiko!?
Sou was safe too, right?
I'm glad you're safe too!

I was worried!
I tried calling but couldn't get through!

Huh…?
Wait, the phone!?

That's my line!
You didn't answer the phone either,
and you didn't reply to my messages either!

What!?
That's not possible!
We were…

Shut up, older brother.
I'll explain.
O-oh.

Shinpei-san, the phone wasn't working
probably because of radio wave interference.
Radio wave interference…?

It seems the whole island is having
radio wave issues.
I heard from others.

It might be related to the commotion at the shrine…
But that's just my personal guess.
I see…
But it's good we're all safe.

By the way, Alain-san was with you too?
Did Shinpei and the others go get him?
Ah, yeah…

We thought the same thing!
Sou and I went back home
because we were worried about our moms.
Wait, then where are Sou's mom and Sou-sensei?
Aren't they with Tokiko?

They're already on the boat.
We were waiting here for Shinpei-san and Mio.
You guys going to get Alain was spot on.

I guess some troublemakers
took advantage of the chaos to commit burglaries.
Burglars?

Yes.
It seems some people came to the island
to take advantage of the festival.

It's amazing how they'd rob
while that monster's roaming around.

That's right.
The world's gotten really dangerous.
(Then what about what Alain said…?)
Shin-chan, can't you believe Dad?
Ah, yeah…

Are you okay, Shinpei?
You look really exhausted.

It's not just tiredness…
After holding it all in for so long,
the relief is overwhelming.
Now that everyone's safe, I'm so sleepy.

You've been through a lot.
You deserve rest.

Shin-chan, don't sleep yet.
Wait until we're on the boat!

Hey you there!
Hurry up and board the boat!
Ah, yes!
Yes, Shin-chan can sleep here.

Wait, wait.
I want to hear what happened
after we got separated.
What did you two get into?

Heh… 
We've been through a lot, huh?
Hey, Shin-chan.
What's with that tone?

Hey, Shinpei!
Did you two have something going on
while escaping!?
N-nothing like that!

We're sorry for the wait.
We'll be departing now.
(At least we can rest now…)

(There's still a lot to think about,
but I need to figure it out)

(But until this boat reaches the mainland,
I can just rest without thinking)

(I'm in trouble…
I fell asleep without realizing it)
…What?

(Is there no one else around?
Where did everyone go?)

(The other passengers
were all here a moment ago!)
Mio, Alain, where are you?
Sou? Toki-chan?

(This feeling… the Shadow's approaching!
But where from!?)

(The Shadow is on the boat…
It's crawling up from the sea!)

(My assumption that the Shadow
couldn't cross rivers and seas was wrong!)

(It's already reached this far out to sea!
Could it reach the mainland!?)
(Where exactly is this boat now?)
Ah…
(The island… is it covered in Shadows!?)

No, wait!
Why is the island so close!?

What if this boat is going back?
Why!?
(I need to get this boat away from the island!)
Captain! Please head out to sea!
Captain! Please get away from that Shadow!

That Shadow devours people!
If we don't get away now,
it'll swallow this boat too!
I understand.
Huh…?
It's nice to see you again.
Y-you…!

(That guy, the four-armed one from the shrine!
Why is he on this boat!?)
Shin-chan.
M-Mio…
Ah, why did you wake up?

If you'd stayed asleep,
you'd have been fine and done with it.
O-oh… done with it?
Dad, Tokiko, Sou, everyone's already gone ahead.
Shin-chan, you need to go too.
